title: Information Access Restriction — SharePoint Anonymous Link Creation Blocked vs Attempted

compliance.assurance_rationale: Auto-migrated from cat-22 markdown on Phase 1.3 run. Requires SME review to confirm clause accuracy, mode (satisfies vs detects-violation-of), and assurance level (contributing/partial/full).

spl:
index=o365 sourcetype=ms:o365:management Workload=SharePoint earliest=-30d Operation="*AnonymousLink*"
| eval outcome=if(match(Operation,"(?i)create") AND !match(Operation,"(?i)block"), "allowed_or_pending", "blocked_or_removed")
| stats count by outcome, UserPrincipalName
value: Compares anonymous sharing attempts to blocked operations for access restriction effectiveness.
implementation: (1) Map Operations to your tenant vocabulary; (2) alert on unexpected allows; (3) DLP alignment.
knownFalsePositives: Administrative tasks, scheduled jobs or platform updates can match this pattern — correlate with change management, maintenance windows and user role before raising severity.
